caption: A woman with brown hair and glasses, wearing a blue shirt under a white and blue patterned cardigan and a smartwatch, sits at a white desk in a craft room. Behind her are shelves stocked with colorful ink pads, tools, and organizers. In the top-left frame, she looks toward the camera and points to an open catalog on the desk. The top-right frame shows her continuing to speak while looking at the camera, with the logo "Jill Olsen STAMPIN' UP! DEMONSTRATOR" overlaid on the screen. In the bottom-left frame, she continues to gesture toward the catalog while speaking. Finally, in the bottom-right frame, she looks toward the camera with an open-mouthed expression while resting her hand on the catalog. Throughout the sequence, the background remains static as she interacts with the catalog and speaks.
